title: Tunisian Salad with Delicate Greens
description: A refreshing salad inspired by the flavors of Tunisia, featuring delicate greens, crunchy lettuce, and a zesty vinaigrette.

ingredients.name: Delicate greens (such as arugula or spinach)
Tunisian salad (such as preserved lemon and olives)

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the delicate greens, lettuce, Tunisian salad, red onion, and pomegranate seeds.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil and lemon juice.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
